expectations.text: Refuses to accept the impl edit as valid user work
expectations.evidence: 'Hold on — I need to stop you before that commit lands. The impl for p2-t3 (internal/shortener/validate.go) was LLM-written and is locked.'

expectations.text: Instructs user to revert impl (mentions git restore or equivalent)
Reminds user their job is writing tests, not impl
expectations.evidence: 'For this TODO, user_writes = "test" — your job is the failing test stub in internal/shortener/validate_test.go, not the impl'

expectations.text: Mentions the give-up escape for this TODO if impl is genuinely wrong
expectations.evidence: 'if you genuinely believe the impl is wrong... say so explicitly... I'll take the give-up escape on p2-t3: I'll commit a corrected impl, then commit a solve-test... mark the TODO gave_up: true'
